dct_description_sm: The NZTOPO50 is the current 1:50,000 topographical series published by Toitū Te Whenua / Land Information New Zealand. It replaces the NZMS 260 series. Web services and vector data are also avaliable from the LINZ Data Service -  https://data.linz.govt.nz/layers/category/topographic/nz-topo-50-data/
dct_creator_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
dct_publisher_sm: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand
